scenes.title: AI-native intelligence for Web3 decisions
scenes.copy: L3AI turns fragmented market signals, wallet-aware journeys, education and risk boundaries into one guided public experience.
scenes.line: L3AI opens with a product-led public experience for Web3 decision context.

scenes.title: The public site now starts with product proof
scenes.copy: Visitors see the platform story, live demo proof, business model and safety boundary before they reach the download library.
scenes.line: The homepage now leads with product proof before documents.

scenes.title: A guided journey replaces disconnected files
scenes.copy: The experience routes users through discovery, onboarding, product understanding, business review and public resources.
scenes.line: A guided journey helps every visitor choose the right next step.

scenes.title: AI Quant explains before action
scenes.copy: The AI Quant path is framed as research context and explanation, not a promise of performance or automated trading.
scenes.line: AI Quant is positioned as explain-before-action research context.

scenes.title: Wallet-aware journeys stay public safe
scenes.copy: Wallet-aware education shows context, verification and records without exposing real private wallet data or balances.
scenes.line: Wallet-aware journeys keep private wallet data outside the public story.

scenes.title: Business model review is visible
scenes.copy: The public business plan connects audience, experience, trust and growth while avoiding forecasts, returns and unsupported claims.
scenes.line: The business model is reviewable without making financial promises.

scenes.title: Resources become a launch room
scenes.copy: Whitepaper, deck, demo package, video assets, media kit, manifests and FAQ are organized for different reviewers.
scenes.line: The resource center becomes a launch room for customers, media, partners and operators.

scenes.title: The trust boundary is part of the product
scenes.copy: L3AI avoids personalized investment advice, guaranteed outcomes, exchange endorsements and real-funds demonstrations.
scenes.line: Clear public boundaries are part of the product experience.

scenes.title: The ecosystem connects product, content and governance
scenes.copy: Source facts, public collateral, QA gates, manifests and approval records keep launch materials controlled and traceable.
scenes.line: The ecosystem connects product narrative, public content and release governance.

scenes.title: The executive deck tells the story visually
scenes.copy: The upgraded deck turns the product, trust model, ecosystem and roadmap into presentation-grade investor collateral.
scenes.line: The executive deck becomes a visual decision aid rather than a document dump.

scenes.title: The video and website now reinforce each other
scenes.copy: The homepage points to the flagship video, while the video directs viewers back to the live public demo and resources.
scenes.line: The website and video now work as one launch experience.

scenes.title: L3AI is ready for controlled public review
scenes.copy: Explore the demo, read the whitepaper, open the executive deck and verify public assets through the manifest.
scenes.line: L3AI is ready for controlled public review through official assets only.
